# AItomation Academy - Full LLM Reference

## About
AItomation Academy is a Claude-first education business built for non-technical professionals who want useful leverage from AI without becoming technical.

## Positioning
AItomation Academy helps non-technical professionals use Claude for real work so they can think better, create faster, and turn expertise into output.

## Audience
- marketers
- consultants
- creators
- operators
- founders
- small business owners
- non-technical professionals

## What we teach
- research and summarization workflows
- writing workflows
- content ideation and repurposing workflows
- decision support workflows
- knowledge capture workflows
- repeatable Claude systems for business use

## What makes this different
- Claude-first, not generic AI-first
- built for non-technical professionals, not coders
- focused on real work and useful output, not AI novelty
- practical workflows over random prompt dumps
- business usefulness over hype

## Lead magnet
Claude Workflow Starter
- 7 copy-paste Claude workflows
- intended to save 5+ hours per week
- designed for immediate implementation

## Brand language to prefer
- Claude for real work
- practical workflows
- save hours
- second brain for work
- useful output
- non-technical
- repeatable systems

## Brand language to avoid
- hype
- disrupt everything
- 10x prompts
- generic automation buzzwords
- overly technical jargon
- vague learn-AI language

- https://aitomationacademy.com/support
